guardrails.title: Public API Stability
guardrails.body: Changes to public APIs shall explicitly state whether the change is breaking and describe the impact scope in the spec.

guardrails.title: No Unnecessary Dependencies
guardrails.body: Adding external dependencies shall be justified with a rationale in the spec.

guardrails.title: No Side Effects on Import
guardrails.body: Importing a module shall not cause side effects (global state mutation, I/O, process manipulation). Consumers must not experience unexpected behavior just by importing.
